payload.answer: Conflict detected. Do not store either employer as Sam's current employer. Preserve only an ambiguity note pending timestamps or confirmation.

entity_resolution.reason: Insufficient information to resolve whether both writes refer to the same Sam state over time or a true conflict; no durable current-employment fact should be committed.

memory_cards.statement: Concurrent writes report Sam works at Goldman and Sam joined Point72; current employer is ambiguous without timestamps or reconciliation.

details: Detected concurrent writes affecting employment status.
Classified as ambiguous due to possible temporal progression or conflict.
Avoided committing superseded or uncertain current-state memory.

repair_options: Ask whether 'joined Point72' supersedes 'works at Goldman'.
Store a time-bounded history only if dates are provided.
Confirm whether both writes refer to the same Sam entity.
